sections.heading: Overview
sections.content: R8 is Android's default code shrinker, obfuscator, and optimizer, replacing ProGuard. It reduces APK size, improves performance, and makes reverse engineering harder. R8 is fully compatible with existing ProGuard rules.

rows.description: Renames classes, methods, and fields to short names to protect IP
Inlines methods, removes dead code, improves runtime performance

rows.rules: Keep model classes for JSON parsing

sections.heading: Mapping File
sections.content: R8 generates mapping.txt for deobfuscating stack traces. Always archive and upload to Play Console & Crashlytics after each release.

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Enable isMinifyEnabled and isShrinkResources for release builds. Write precise keep rules to preserve reflection-accessed code. Verify with seeds.txt/usage.txt, test minified builds, and maintain mapping files for crash debugging.
